name: Cloak of Refraction
description: Notes A powerful cloak that offers sublime stat bonuses and the ability to deploy a stationary decoy. The two mirror images orbiting the decoy rapidly shoot towards the decoy every 0.2 seconds, allowing for high concentrated damage as enemies approach it.
effects: Summon: 3 Mirror Images - the center is a decoy, the outer two orbit the center and fire 1 shot inwards and 2 shots outwards Damage: 200-300 (average: 250) Range: 6 tiles Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles After exiting sneak: Fire 2 additional projectiles dealing damage equal to your Lethal Strike damage for 2.4 seconds. Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 40 (+1 per WIS > 34) and 30% (+1% per WIS > 34) of target’s defense as additional damage for 2.4 seconds MP Cost: 2 MP/proj Cooldown: 0.1 sec
